sys_ui_policy.description: 2.5 P3 STRY0085538 - RESPONSE/REVIEWER - Task Form - latest "Rework Comments" displays on Task form when populated on Send to Rework Modal UI MODAL - (Portal & Platform) Modal for Rework Comments - "Send to Rework" UI Action
sys_ui_policy.short_description: Task - UI Policy - JS - Rework Comments - Visible
sys_ui_policy.sys_name: Task - UI Policy - JS - Rework Comments - Visible
